questions.question: Choose the SYNONYM of 'ABANDON'. (Set 21)
questions.solution: Step 1: 'abandon' means leave completely. Step 2: Closest match is 'desert'. Answer: desert.

questions.question: Choose the SYNONYM of 'BENEVOLENT'.
questions.solution: Step 1: 'benevolent' means well-meaning. Step 2: Closest match is 'kind'. Answer: kind.

questions.question: Choose the SYNONYM of 'EPHEMERAL'.
questions.solution: Step 1: 'ephemeral' means lasting briefly. Step 2: Closest match is 'short-lived'. Answer: short-lived.

questions.question: Choose the SYNONYM of 'FRUGAL'.
questions.solution: Step 1: 'frugal' means economical. Step 2: Closest match is 'thrifty'. Answer: thrifty.

questions.question: Choose the SYNONYM of 'HOSTILE'.
questions.solution: Step 1: 'hostile' means opposed. Step 2: Closest match is 'unfriendly'. Answer: unfriendly.

questions.question: Choose the SYNONYM of 'LUCID'.
questions.solution: Step 1: 'lucid' means easy to understand. Step 2: Closest match is 'clear'. Answer: clear.

questions.question: Choose the SYNONYM of 'METICULOUS'.
questions.solution: Step 1: 'meticulous' means very detailed. Step 2: Closest match is 'careful'. Answer: careful.

questions.question: Choose the SYNONYM of 'OBSCURE'.
questions.solution: Step 1: 'obscure' means not well known. Step 2: Closest match is 'unclear'. Answer: unclear.

questions.question: Choose the SYNONYM of 'PRUDENT'.
questions.solution: Step 1: 'prudent' means sensible. Step 2: Closest match is 'wise'. Answer: wise.

questions.question: Choose the SYNONYM of 'VERBOSE'.
questions.solution: Step 1: 'verbose' means using many words. Step 2: Closest match is 'wordy'. Answer: wordy.

questions.question: Choose the ANTONYM of 'GENEROUS'. (Set 31)
questions.solution: Step 1: 'generous' means the opposite of generous. Step 2: Answer: stingy.

questions.question: Choose the ANTONYM of 'ANCIENT'. (Set 32)
questions.solution: Step 1: 'ancient' means the opposite of ancient. Step 2: Answer: modern.

questions.question: Choose the ANTONYM of 'HASTY'.
questions.solution: Step 1: 'hasty' means the opposite of hasty. Step 2: Answer: slow.

questions.question: Choose the ANTONYM of 'MODEST'.
questions.solution: Step 1: 'modest' means the opposite of modest. Step 2: Answer: arrogant.

questions.question: Choose the ANTONYM of 'TRANSPARENT'.
questions.solution: Step 1: 'transparent' means the opposite of transparent. Step 2: Answer: opaque.
